Profile.loginSubtitle: Track expenses, manage budgets, and view analysis after logging in.

Login.subtitle: Log in to manage your finances.
Login.infoBox: This application exclusively supports Google authentication. External email/password systems are not available to ensure maximum security.

Documentation.title: Documentation
Documentation.heroDescription: ByeBoros is a personal finance tracker app that saves your income, expenses, and budget data directly to your own Google Sheets.
Documentation.step1Desc1: Download the spreadsheet template that has been prepared.
Documentation.step1Desc2: Open Google Sheets, then go to File → Import → Upload, and select the downloaded file.
Documentation.step1Desc3: Choose "Create new spreadsheet" and click Import Data. Once done, move on to the next step.
Documentation.step1Warning: Do not change the column structure in the template (column names & order).
Documentation.step2Desc1: Now that the sheet is ready, open it and click the "Share" button in the top-right corner.
Documentation.step2Desc2: Enter the following email address to grant byeBoros access:
Documentation.step2Desc3: Set the permission to "Editor", then click Send. After that, proceed to the final step.
Documentation.step2Info: This is an automated account (robot) owned by byeBoros — not a real person. It can only access your sheet via code, not through a browser.
Documentation.step3Desc1: Almost done! Copy the URL of your Google Sheet from the browser's address bar.
Documentation.step3Desc2: Open byeBoros → Profile → Settings, paste the link, and tap Save.
Documentation.step3Success: You're all set! byeBoros is now connected and ready to use.
Documentation.featureLoginDesc: One-click login with Google account, no need to create a new account.
Documentation.featureExpenseDesc: Record name, category, amount, date & time of expenses.
Documentation.featureIncomeDesc: Record description, category, priority, amount & date of income.
Documentation.featureHistoryDesc: View all transactions, grouped by date, with filters.
Documentation.featureBudgetDesc: Create categories & sub-categories, set daily & monthly budgets.
Documentation.featureAnalysisDesc: View total expenses vs budget, income, and remaining budget.
Documentation.howStep1: You log in with Google and record transactions in the app.
Documentation.howStep2: The byeBoros server saves data to your Google Sheets.
Documentation.howStep3: You can view history, categories, and analysis anytime.
Documentation.whyGoogleSheetsDesc: Transparent (view directly), secure (in your personal account), free, and easy to share.
Documentation.faqSafeA: Data is stored in your personal Google Sheets account. byeBoros does not store your financial data elsewhere.
Documentation.faqDevQ: Can the developer see my data?
Documentation.faqDevA: No. The developer cannot open or view your Google Sheet through a browser.
Documentation.saComparisonTitle: Service Account vs Google Account Comparison
Documentation.faqDevExplain: A service account is like a "robot" that can only work through code (API). It cannot login to Google, cannot open a browser, and has no interface to view your spreadsheet.
Documentation.saUse1: Record new transactions to the spreadsheet.
Documentation.saUse2: Read transaction data to display in the app.
Documentation.faqDevTip: If you still feel uncomfortable, you can always open Google Sheet → click Share → remove the service account access. After that, the app won't be able to access your data anymore.
Documentation.faqMobileQ: Can I use it on mobile?
Documentation.faqMobileA: Yes, as long as you can open a browser.
Documentation.faqDeleteQ: What if the spreadsheet is deleted?
Documentation.faqDeleteA: Transaction data will be lost. Do not delete the spreadsheet used by byeBoros.
Documentation.faqFamilyQ: Can it be used for family finances?
Documentation.faqFamilyA: Yes, just share Google Sheets access with family members.
Documentation.footer: Have questions? Contact the developer for further assistance.
